name: get_component_property
description: Read serialized property values from a component on a scene GameObject. Call with just game_object and component_type to list all properties and their values, or specify property_name to read a specific property. Property names support auto-matching (e.g. 'useGravity' will find 'm_UseGravity').

game_object.description: The name of the GameObject in the scene.

component_type.description: The type name of the component, e.g. 'Rigidbody', 'Camera', 'PlayerController'.

property_name.description: Optional. A specific property name to read. If omitted, all properties and their values are returned. Supports C# property names (e.g. 'useGravity') and serialized field names (e.g. 'm_UseGravity').
